---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

_What clinical workflow, developer pain point, or user task is this solving?
One or two paragraphs. Lead with the user, not the solution._

## Proposed solution

_What would the new capability look like? If it involves a new agent,
integration, or rule file, sketch where it lives in the repo._

## Safety impact

- [ ] This feature adds or modifies a Tier 3 (physician-gated) workflow
- [ ] This feature adds or modifies a CDS rule
- [ ] This feature touches prescribing, dosing, or orders
- [ ] This feature touches PHI storage or transport
- [ ] This feature is UI / docs / tooling only (no clinical impact)

If any of the first four are checked, describe the safeguard:

_How will the new feature maintain the "standard of care is the guardrail"
rule? What Tier 3 approval path will it use? How will it be audited?_

## Alternatives considered

_What else did you think about, and why is the proposed approach better?_

## Open questions

_What's unclear? Things that need a decision from a reviewer before
implementation starts._

## References

_Link to evidence sources (guidelines, papers, existing code patterns,
similar features in other modules)._
